text:
Let the Games begin! Sporting eyes from around the world will be focused on Paris this summer as theOlympicshead to the French capital. Our special edition preview is on sale now. Clickhereto buy.

A 327-strongTeam GBmake the journey across the Channel in the search of gold, along with superstars from around the globe.

The Daily Mirror's ultimate unofficial guide to the Games includes interviews with some of our leading medal contenders and features on those hoping to light up the 16 days of action.

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

Our brilliant day-by-day rundown tells you what's on when, what you can't miss, the expected star of the day and the Brit with the best chance of a medal.

We turn the spotlight on the venues being used, and we take a look back at the golden moments from Games gone by. You can pick up a copy of our special edition at participating retailers, or buy onlinehere. Postage and packaging costs apply to online orders.

title: Olympics 2024 Special edition - on sale now | Other | Sport | Express.co.uk
author: Chloe Robinson
description: Our day-by-day run down of what's on - yours for just £3.99.
